# redpanda_group (Resource)

A Redpanda Cloud group for group-based access control (GBAC).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the group. Changing the name requires replacing the group.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the group

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the group
